name: LANG_DEV_V2_WORKFLOW
description: Swarm workflow for executing the language-development methodology consolidated in workflows/LANG_DEV/LANGS_DEV_RDC/. Given a target programming library plus pre-generated nexus reports, produces a fully-functional DSL covering the library's domain (compiler pipeline + runtime support). Replaces v0.1.0-SUPERSEDED (workflows/LANG_DEV/) which had ten architectural defects documented in workflows/LANG_DEV_V2/WHY_V2.md. v2 implements the 4-phase grouped task model from the RDC corpus, includes Phase 4 (RUNTIME — excluded by v1), enforces the COURT #1 SYNTHESIS ruling on STEP 5A/5B ordering, requires nexus reports as a workflow input, supports multi-doc-per-task reads, allows controlled parallelism in Phase 4, and gates METHODOLOGY_GREEN_LIGHT on a methodology-level integration test (shuffle invariance + compression check + e2e demo). Triggered by 'LANG_DEV_V2_WORKFLOW' or 'LANG_DEV_V2'. Owner: Michael. Orchestrator: QUEEN (Claude in main conversation, not a spawned agent).

on_engage: QUEEN reads this JSON in full
QUEEN reads workflows/LANG_DEV_V2/contracts/{PHASE_01_CONTRACT.md, PHASE_02_CONTRACT.md, PHASE_03_CONTRACT.md, PHASE_04_CONTRACT.md, ARTIFACT_CATALOG.md}

QUEEN reports: 'LANG_DEV_V2_WORKFLOW mode engaged. Inputs: target=<path or pending>, nexus=<path or pending>, workspace=<path or pending>, step_source=<path or default>. Ready. Provide target_library, nexus_reports_dir, and workspace_dir to begin.'
QUEEN waits for explicit human direction specifying all required inputs, then runs PRESTEP validation per spec/INPUT_CONTRACT.md §6

parameters_required.target_library: absolute path to the library being deconstructed (e.g., /home/user/repos/pandas)
parameters_required.nexus_reports_dir: absolute path to directory containing nexus reports for the target library. Auto-derived as <target_library>_nexus/ if absent. Must contain GRAVITY, GRAMMAR, VERBS, TIERS, CLASSIFICATION, GENESIS, GENERATOR, COMPRESSION reports.
parameters_required.workspace_dir: absolute path where intermediate outputs land. Created if absent. Must be empty if exists (no --reuse-workspace flag in v2.0.0).
parameters_required.step_source_dir: absolute path to directory containing the 22 source methodology docs (16 STEP + 4 boss_level + context.md + CREATOR_NOTES.md). Default: LANG_DEV_STEPS/ at project root.

relationship_to_other_workflows.position: parallel-altitude to SDLC, RDC, RECON, BOOK family, ORGANIZE, LANG_DEV (v1)
relationship_to_other_workflows.supersedes: workflows/LANG_DEV/LANG_DEV_WORKFLOW.json (v0.1.0-SUPERSEDED). v1 is preserved as a historical artifact; do not engage.
relationship_to_other_workflows.rdc_coupling: LANGS_DEV_RDC was used to produce the authoritative methodology corpus that drives v2. v2 does NOT auto-trigger RDC; the RDC pass already happened (output at workflows/LANG_DEV/LANGS_DEV_RDC/).
relationship_to_other_workflows.sdlc_coupling: v2's PHASE TODOs (in LANGS_DEV_RDC/) are SDLC-shaped and could in principle be handed to SDLC directly. v2 keeps the workflow specialized because: (a) per-task acceptance is methodology-specific (shuffle test, compression check), (b) multi-doc-per-task reads, (c) on-demand recovery semantics. Open question — see LANG_DEV_V2_BUILDOUT_TODO.md Open Questions §1.
relationship_to_other_workflows.recon_coupling: Before engaging v2 on a new target library, RECON can characterize the library structure. Manual handoff.
relationship_to_other_workflows.organize_coupling: None. v2 operates on domain artefacts, not project structure.

nexus_reports_dir.escalate_on_fail: nexus_reports invalid: <reason>; required reports listed above

workspace_dir.init_action: mkdir -p; write empty workspace_manifest.json with schema v1.0.0

step_source_dir.step_5_naming_note: Per COURT #1 SYNTHESIS, STEP_05A == 'STEP 5 - DECISIONS SCHEMA.md' (format) and STEP_05B == 'STEP 5 - BAG GRAMMAR.md' (operators). Enforced by hard rule step_5_ordering.

phase_model.description: Four serial phases plus terminal METHODOLOGY_INTEGRATION. Per spec/PHASE_MODEL.md.

PHASE_1.name: DECONSTRUCTION
PHASE_1.concern: Find primitives, objects, type signatures of the target library.

T-01.1.1.title: Recover Ops
T-01.1.1.trigger_condition: T-01.1 reaches retry limit without TASK_PASS

PHASE_2.name: DESIGN
PHASE_2.concern: Specify atoms, decisions schema, bag grammar, rulesets, tokens.

PHASE_3.name: IMPLEMENTATION
PHASE_3.concern: Build the compiler pipeline (lexer, validator, parser, typer, classifier, solver).

T-03.5.title: Solver (Solver-level shuffle test gate)
T-03.5.acid_test: Solver-level shuffle invariance over 100+ iterations on 10+ diverse bags

PHASE_4.name: RUNTIME
PHASE_4.concern: Build executor, optimizer, error reporter, debugger.
PHASE_4.parallelism_note: T-04.3 first (defines unified Error type); then T-04.1 and T-04.2 can run in parallel; T-04.4 depends on T-04.1.

T-04.3.title: Error Reporter
T-04.3.rationale_first: Defines unified Error type; subsequent runtime stages emit against it.

T-04.2.title: Optimizer
T-04.2.golden_rule: optimized_output == original_output, ALWAYS. Verified by correctness_suite.py over 20+ plans.

METHODOLOGY_INTEGRATION.name: METHODOLOGY_INTEGRATION
METHODOLOGY_INTEGRATION.concern: Methodology-level acceptance gate: shuffle test on full DSL + compression check + e2e demo.

QUEEN.description: QUEEN is Claude in main conversation when LANG_DEV_V2_WORKFLOW is active. Runs PRESTEP validation, spawns PHASE_EXECUTOR + PHASE_QA per task, manages workspace_manifest.json, INPROGRESS.md updates, retry counters, on-demand spawn semantics, methodology-level integration handoff.
responsibilities: PRESTEP: validate all 4 inputs per spec/INPUT_CONTRACT.md §6
Initialize workspace_dir + empty workspace_manifest.json + INPROGRESS engagement entry
Per-task: assemble PHASE_EXECUTOR context packet, spawn, receive outputs, spawn PHASE_QA, collect verdict
On TASK_PASS: append to workspace_manifest.json, advance per dependency graph
On TASK_FAIL_RETRY: re-spawn PHASE_EXECUTOR with findings; retry_counter++
On Phase 1 T-01.1 retry-exhausted: spawn T-01.1.1 RECOVER (on-demand)
On all phase tasks PASS: append phase summary, emit PHASE_GREEN_LIGHT, advance
QUEEN.verdict_authority: QUEEN does NOT override PHASE_QA verdicts. QUEEN does NOT override METHODOLOGY_INTEGRATOR's verdict. If PHASE_QA says TASK_PASS, advance without re-checking. If TASK_FAIL_RETRY, spawn fix cycle.
does_not: skip phases or tasks (except on-demand T-01.1.1 when not triggered)

PHASE_EXECUTOR.context_access: full read on target_library, nexus_reports_dir, step_source_dir, workspace_dir; read+write on workspace_dir for own task's outputs
PHASE_EXECUTOR.description: Executes one task per spawn. Multi-doc reads (source_docs is an array). Writes outputs per the task's output_contract. Returns structured completion report. Generic pattern — task-specific knowledge lives in source docs + contract, not in this worker's role doc.
inputs_per_spawn: source_docs (array of absolute paths under step_source_dir)
recovery_mode (boolean; true only for T-01.1.1 spawns)
produces: workspace_manifest entry update (appended by QUEEN on TASK_PASS)

structured completion report with: outputs_paths, source_doc_citations (per output, which doc + section), acceptance_command_results (verbatim), ambiguities_surfaced (cross-doc disagreements found, if any)
discipline: full-read every doc in source_docs array (no partial scans)
full-read prior_phase_outputs referenced by the contract
produce outputs in the EXACT shape the contract declares
no fabrication — every output entry traces to source-doc analysis or prior outputs
honest ambiguity — if source docs disagree, surface in completion report; do not silently pick
no scope creep into other tasks' lanes
triggered_by: QUEEN with recovery_mode=true for T-01.1.1 spawns

PHASE_QA.context_access: full read on workspace_dir, source_docs, output_contract, nexus_reports_dir
PHASE_QA.description: Per-task QA. Bounded by the task's output_contract from contracts/PHASE_<N>_CONTRACT.md. Runs the contract's acceptance commands and verifies completion criteria. Does not perform the work itself. Same-doc-and-contract authority model.
produces: structured findings array; each finding: severity (Critical/High/Medium/Low) + criterion violated (cites contract section) + specific evidence (file path + line/JSON path)
discipline: TASK_PASS requires: all required outputs present, all completion criteria met, all acceptance commands exit 0, no fabrication detected in completion report
High/Medium findings → TASK_PASS with warnings unless numerous (count threshold: 3)
bounded scope — only check what the output_contract specifies
no fabrication — every finding cites contract section + executor output location
run every acceptance command; include verbatim output in verdict

METHODOLOGY_INTEGRATOR.context_access: full read on workspace_dir (entire tree), spec/REFERENCE_LIBRARY.md, spec/{SHUFFLE_TEST_SPEC,COMPRESSION_SPEC,E2E_DEMO_SPEC}.md
METHODOLOGY_INTEGRATOR.description: Terminal acceptance worker. Runs methodology-level integration tests on the produced DSL: shuffle test on full pipeline, compression ratio check, e2e demo. No-op v1 equivalent. Spawned by QUEEN after PHASE_4 PHASE_GREEN_LIGHT.
discipline: shuffle test: 100+ iterations on 10+ diverse bags; assertion: solve(bag) == solve(shuffle(bag))
compression check: count of main-tier primitives vs target library API surface; ratio ≥ 18:1 (target ~20:1)
e2e demo: source string → executed output; matches expected output structure
no fabrication of test results — every assertion ran

PHASE_TASK_UNIT.description: One task's atomic execution: PHASE_EXECUTOR → PHASE_QA. Sequential, atomic.
PHASE_TASK_UNIT.retry_semantics: On TASK_FAIL_RETRY, PHASE_EXECUTOR re-spawned with findings as prior_retry_findings. PHASE_QA re-runs. At task_retry_counter == 2, TASK_FAIL_ESCALATE.

PARALLEL_BATCH_UNIT.description: Used in Phase 4 for parallel siblings (T-04.1 + T-04.2 after T-04.3 lands). Each sibling runs as its own PHASE_TASK_UNIT in parallel; QUEEN aggregates verdicts before advancing.
PARALLEL_BATCH_UNIT.aggregate_rule: All siblings TASK_PASS → batch PASS. Any sibling TASK_FAIL_ESCALATE → batch HOLD. Mix of PASS and FAIL_RETRY → wait for retries to settle, then aggregate.

ON_DEMAND_UNIT.description: T-01.1.1 RECOVER. Spawns only when triggering condition met (T-01.1 retry-exhausted). Same shape as PHASE_TASK_UNIT but bounded by max_attempts=3.

METHODOLOGY_INTEGRATION_UNIT.description: Terminal unit. METHODOLOGY_INTEGRATOR runs once after PHASE_4 PHASE_GREEN_LIGHT. No PHASE_QA — METHODOLOGY_INTEGRATOR's own report is the verdict.
METHODOLOGY_INTEGRATION_UNIT.retry_semantics: Max 1 retry on METHODOLOGY_INCOMPLETE; then escalate.

actions: derive nexus_reports_dir if not provided; validate per inputs.nexus_reports_dir.validation
derive step_source_dir if not provided; validate per inputs.step_source_dir.validation (must contain all 22 required files)
if any validation fails: ESCALATE with structured error report; do not proceed
mkdir -p workspace_dir; write workspace_manifest.json with schema_version 1.0.0 and engagement metadata
prepend engagement entry to INPROGRESS.md at project root
report ready to user; await confirmation to begin Phase 1

per_phase_pattern: for each task in phase.tasks_serial_order: spawn PHASE_TASK_UNIT
if a task is parallel-with-siblings: collect siblings into PARALLEL_BATCH_UNIT
on TASK_PASS: append outputs to workspace_manifest.json; advance per dependency graph
on TASK_FAIL_RETRY (retry_counter < 2): re-spawn PHASE_EXECUTOR with findings
on TASK_FAIL_ESCALATE: spawn ON_DEMAND_UNIT (T-01.1.1) if applicable; else emit PHASE_HOLD
after all tasks in phase reach TASK_PASS: write phase completion to INPROGRESS.md, emit PHASE_GREEN_LIGHT, advance to next phase

actions: spawn METHODOLOGY_INTEGRATOR with workspace_dir + spec docs + reference_library_path
INTEGRATOR runs shuffle test, compression check, e2e demo; produces METHODOLOGY_REPORT.md + 3 supporting artifacts
on METHODOLOGY_GREEN_LIGHT: QUEEN updates workspace_manifest.json, writes final entry to INPROGRESS.md, emits CLEAN_RUN
on METHODOLOGY_INCOMPLETE (first attempt): QUEEN re-spawns INTEGRATOR once with diagnostic findings
on METHODOLOGY_INCOMPLETE (second attempt): QUEEN emits METHODOLOGY_INCOMPLETE workflow verdict; pauses; reports

main_sequence: PRESTEP: validate inputs + initialize workspace + INPROGRESS engagement entry
PHASE_1 iteration: T-01.1 → (T-01.1.1 if needed) → T-01.2 → T-01.3 → PHASE_GREEN_LIGHT
PHASE_2 iteration: T-02.1 → T-02.2 → T-02.3 → T-02.4 → T-02.4.1 → T-02.4.2 → PHASE_GREEN_LIGHT
PHASE_3 iteration: T-03.1 → T-03.1.1 → T-03.2 → T-03.3 → T-03.4 → T-03.5 → PHASE_GREEN_LIGHT
PHASE_4 iteration: T-04.3 → (T-04.1 || T-04.2 in parallel) → T-04.4 → PHASE_GREEN_LIGHT
METHODOLOGY_INTEGRATION: shuffle test + compression + e2e demo → METHODOLOGY_GREEN_LIGHT
FINALIZE: workspace_manifest.json closed; INPROGRESS final entry; CLEAN_RUN verdict

per_task_verdicts.TASK_PASS: PHASE_QA PASS against contract; QUEEN advances per dependency graph
per_task_verdicts.TASK_FAIL_RETRY: PHASE_QA FAIL with retries remaining; re-spawn PHASE_EXECUTOR
per_task_verdicts.TASK_FAIL_ESCALATE: PHASE_QA FAIL + retry_counter at limit; pause and escalate
per_task_verdicts.TASK_SKIP_BY_DESIGN: On-demand task not triggered (e.g., T-01.1.1 when T-01.1 passes first attempt); not a failure

per_phase_verdicts.PHASE_GREEN_LIGHT: All mandatory phase tasks TASK_PASS; advance to next phase
per_phase_verdicts.PHASE_HOLD: At least one task TASK_FAIL_ESCALATE; phase incomplete; workflow paused
per_phase_verdicts.PHASE_BLOCKED: Cascading hold — a task cannot start because a dependency escalated

methodology_verdicts.METHODOLOGY_INCOMPLETE: Any phase HOLD/BLOCKED; OR all phases PASS but METHODOLOGY_INTEGRATOR FAIL

workflow_verdicts.CLEAN_RUN: METHODOLOGY_GREEN_LIGHT achieved. Full DSL runnable end-to-end.
workflow_verdicts.PARTIAL_RUN: Workflow halted by human after some phases PASS but before METHODOLOGY_GREEN_LIGHT. Completed work preserved.
workflow_verdicts.ESCALATED: Phase HOLD or METHODOLOGY_INCOMPLETE. Workflow paused. Human resolves and resumes (or aborts).

loop_limits.task_retry_counter_semantics: Per-task counter. Resets to 0 at each task entry. Increments on TASK_FAIL_RETRY. At 2, TASK_FAIL_ESCALATE.
loop_limits.recovery_attempts_semantics: Counts T-01.1.1 spawns triggered by T-01.1 escalation. At 3, T-01.1 emits TASK_FAIL_ESCALATE definitively (no further recovery).
loop_limits.methodology_integration_semantics: If METHODOLOGY_INTEGRATOR's first run yields METHODOLOGY_INCOMPLETE, QUEEN re-spawns once with findings as context. If second run also INCOMPLETE, workflow emits METHODOLOGY_INCOMPLETE final verdict.
loop_limits.no_global_retry_budget: Tasks do not share retry budgets
loop_limits.no_per_phase_retry: Phases are not re-run as a unit; only individual tasks retry

hard_rules.step_5_ordering: Per COURT #1 SYNTHESIS ruling in workflows/LANG_DEV/LANGS_DEV_RDC/INPROGRESS.md: STEP_05A == 'STEP 5 - DECISIONS SCHEMA.md' (T-02.2; format layer); STEP_05B == 'STEP 5 - BAG GRAMMAR.md' (T-02.3; operator layer). Format precedes operators because grammar layers on top of the schema's atom records. v1 had these reversed; v2 enforces the corrected ordering. Violation: PHASE_QA emits TASK_FAIL_ESCALATE on detection.
hard_rules.nexus_reports_required: PRESTEP cannot complete without all 8 required nexus reports present in nexus_reports_dir. Phase 1 cannot execute without nexus reports as analytical input. No bypass.
hard_rules.phase_4_required: METHODOLOGY_GREEN_LIGHT cannot be emitted without Phase 4 (T-04.1 through T-04.4) complete. Without Phase 4, the methodology produces a compiler pipeline nobody can run. v1's exclusion of Phase 4 is the most consequential v1 defect.
hard_rules.methodology_acceptance: CLEAN_RUN requires METHODOLOGY_INTEGRATOR PASS: shuffle test PASS (100+ iterations on 10+ diverse bags) + compression ratio ≥ 18:1 + e2e demo PASS. Per-phase verdicts alone do not constitute methodology acceptance.
hard_rules.multi_doc_authority: PHASE_EXECUTOR's source_docs is an array. Worker full-reads every doc in the array. PHASE_QA's authority is bounded by the source docs PLUS the contract — not by the source docs alone. Cross-doc disagreement is surfaced honestly, not silently resolved.
hard_rules.no_fabrication: Every output entry traces to source-doc analysis, prior-phase output, or target_library / nexus_reports content. PHASE_QA findings cite specific source-doc lines + executor-output locations. Fabrication detected by PHASE_QA → TASK_FAIL_ESCALATE.
hard_rules.no_step_doc_modification: The 22 source docs in step_source_dir are read-only. The methodology source is immutable; methodology corrections happen outside this workflow.
hard_rules.workspace_discipline: Intermediate outputs land in workspace_dir per ARTIFACT_CATALOG.md. Authoritative artifact <library>_decisions.json lives at workspace_dir root (not in a STEP subdir) because every Phase 3 stage consumes it.
hard_rules.workspace_manifest_single_source_of_trut: workspace_manifest.json records every artifact with path + producing-task + checksum. Append-only after task PASS. Never rewritten.
hard_rules.inprogress_prepend_only: INPROGRESS.md entries are prepend-only (except checkbox toggles). No deletions, no rewrites of past entries.
hard_rules.queen_does_not_override_qa: QUEEN does NOT override PHASE_QA verdicts. If PHASE_QA says TASK_PASS, QUEEN advances without re-checking. If TASK_FAIL_RETRY, QUEEN spawns fix cycle without second-guessing.
hard_rules.queen_does_not_override_integrator: QUEEN does NOT override METHODOLOGY_INTEGRATOR's verdict.
hard_rules.no_phase_skip: A phase task must reach TASK_PASS (or TASK_SKIP_BY_DESIGN for on-demand) before downstream tasks proceed. No skipping.
hard_rules.no_auto_workflow_trigger: v2 never auto-triggers RDC, RECON, SDLC, BOOK, or ORGANIZE.
hard_rules.no_workflow_mixing: While v2 is active, do not interleave with another workflow.
hard_rules.never_no_verify: Never use git commit --no-verify to bypass hooks.
hard_rules.honest_ambiguity: When source docs disagree (e.g., STEP doc + retrofit), PHASE_EXECUTOR surfaces the disagreement in the completion report. Does not silently pick one.

v1_dropped_rules.monolithic_serial: DROPPED. Phase 4 components run in parallel per dependency graph.

known_tbds.topic: Reuse-workspace flag for resuming partial runs
known_tbds.details: v2.0.0 requires empty workspace_dir. Resume semantics for partial runs not modeled.
PRESTEP only validates filename presence. Schema validation of nexus content would slow PRESTEP significantly; deferred.
Whether one workflow run can produce DSLs for multiple target libraries
When (if ever) the workflow updates PCFG weights during a run vs as a separate post-methodology step

known_tbds.topic: Whether v2 should be a workflow at all
known_tbds.details: RDC PHASE TODOs are SDLC-shaped; could be handed to SDLC directly. v2 keeps specialized workflow because of multi-doc reads, on-demand recovery, methodology-level acceptance. See LANG_DEV_V2_BUILDOUT_TODO.md Open Questions §1.
